invariants: one runtime sourceRevision for Admin, Cliente, Shopper and reports
fresh=1 fail-closed with runtime_refresh and no silent stale fallback
period change updates KPI, rows, detail and exports
assignment/questionnaire canary updates only expected surfaces
Admin, Cliente and reports remain transversally coherent
shopper marketplace removes visits assigned in HR

adminVisits: Visible state, filters, details, KPI drilldowns and exports must consume canonical visit facets, never raw v.estado as the sole truth.
Assignment, scheduling, execution, questionnaire, submission, liquidation and payment remain orthogonal.
Unknown financial values remain null/pending source; explicit zero is shown only when the source confirms zero.
The current project, period, country scope and sourceRevision must remain unchanged by rendering or export.
postulations: Reassignment must show current shopper, date and slot and require an explicit decision: keep date/slot, change date/slot, or leave pending scheduling.
Reassignment must never erase or invent a date silently.
The Export action must be implemented for the visible filtered scope and active period only, with source revision and authorized columns.
Protected or absent phone/contact values must display a safe label, never undefined/null/raw technical literals.
No UI message may claim HR synchronization or real write unless the corresponding authorized gate and write result exist.
canary: Assign or remove one shopper in the controlled source.
Confirm or remove one questionnaire in the controlled source.
Verify expected KPI/list changes without full document reload.
Verify the shopper marketplace removes/adds only the correct visit.
Verify Admin, Cliente and reports share the same sourceRevision and counts.

prohibitions: Do not reinterpret HR rules in frontend modules.
Do not hardcode July 2026 counts or any period-specific exception.
Do not restore snapshot-only behavior or location.reload.
Do not convert missing data to zero.
Do not connect or copy the legacy database.
Do not activate HR, Firestore, Auth, Storage, Make, Gemini, payment or production writes.
Do not create a new branch or pull request.
freezeCriteria: All M1 regression gates pass on the exact candidate hash.
Corte 2A acceptance checks pass without P0.
Paula validates the exact DEV build visually.
Checkpoint, CAMBIOS, Claude, PENDIENTES, Academia, tracker and PR #7 are updated.
The accepted delta is applied atomically to docs-tya-v6-v71-audit and HEAD_AFTER is recorded.
